name: 30" Round Pieced Faux Horn Wall Mirror - Threshold™
description:
Bring rustic charm to your home decor with this Faux Horn Wall Mirror from Threshold™. This wall mirror features a wooden frame with faux horn finish that adds natural warmth and a touch of luxury to your space. Designed in a round shape, this mirror can be easily mounted on the wall using pegs or screws to make your entryway, study, or living room look beautiful.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Forest Stewardship Council® Certified - We’re committed to making products better for you, and the world. This product is certified by the Forest Stewardship Council, which promotes environmentally appropriate, socially beneficial, and economically viable management of the world’s forests. FSC-N003198
